title: Figure 3 in Usefulness of microsatellite loci for differentiating between Dibothriocephalus dendriticus and Dibothriocephalus ditremus (Cestoda: Diphyllobothriidea)
author: Králová-Hromadová, Ivica
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 3. PCR amplification of genomic DNA of Dibothriocephalus dendriticus (Dde) and Dibothriocephalus ditremus (Ddi) from Takvatn lake, Norway (NO-TA), Kalandsvatn lake, Norway (NO-KA), Hafravatn lake, Iceland (IS-HA) and Thingvallavatn lake, Iceland (IS-TH) using (A) primers amplifying the microsatellite locus Dd_8 and (B) primers amplifying the microsatellite locus Dd_33 designed by Bazsalovicsová et al. (2020) for D. dendriticus. Lane M: 100 bp ladder.
steps_raw: Figure 3. PCR amplification of genomic DNA of Dibothriocephalus dendriticus (Dde) and Dibothriocephalus ditremus (Ddi) from Takvatn lake, Norway (NO-TA), Kalandsvatn lake, Norway (NO-KA), Hafravatn lake, Iceland (IS-HA) and Thingvallavatn lake, Iceland (IS-TH) using (A) primers amplifying the microsatellite locus Dd_8 and (B) primers amplifying the microsatellite locus Dd_33 designed by Bazsalovicsová et al. (2020) for D. dendriticus. Lane M: 100 bp ladder.
